The vSphere Automation API provides a unified programmatic interface for managing VMware vSphere environments. It enables automation of virtual machine lifecycle management, host and cluster configuration, content library management, tagging, and other vSphere infrastructure operations. This RESTful API replaces many legacy SOAP-based interfaces and supports JSON request and response payloads over HTTPS.
